# toshi — auto-generated wiki

> Generated by `scripts/auto-doc.cjs` on 2026-07-17T18:11:59.207Z. Re-run to refresh.

## What it is
A floating terminal companion: a tiny AI mascot (Toshi) that lives in a transparent, always-on-top window beside your terminal and answers grounded questions about your current session via an MCP server.

## Shape
- mcp/       1 files
- lib/       3 files
- panel/     5 files
- desktop/   5 files
- tools/     7 files
- scripts/   1 files
- test/      7 files
- (root)     3 files

## Spine (do not break casually)
1. `lib/session.mjs` — session knowledge (ask/status/setRepo); consumed by mcp + tools
2. `lib/llm.mjs` — chat + grounded speak()
3. `mcp/toshi-mcp.mjs` — stdio MCP server (toshi_status/ask/mood/watch) + /ask bridge
4. `desktop/main.cjs` — Electron entry; spawns the brain
5. `panel/index.html` — the only UI; talks to brain over :4820
6. `serve.js` — static panel server on :4821 (browser-only dev)

## How to run it
- install: `npm install`
- run face: `npm run toshi` (Electron floating window + brain)
- run brain: `npm run brain` (stdio MCP server only)
- ask CLI: `npm run ask`
- test: `npm test`

## How to make a safe first change
- Pick a leaf in `test/`; run `npm test` first.
- Tweak a cosmetic in `panel/index.html` (CSS, lines 16–50).
- Avoid `lib/session.mjs` and `mcp/toshi-mcp.mjs` until you know which of the 5 callers you'll break.
